Professional Journey

11+ years across iOS engineering, architecture leadership, and product delivery.

Current Role Jul 2026 - Present

Technical Lead — Manager Associate (SDE4)

Capital One|Nottingham, UK
  • Tech lead of a high-performing cross-functional team, owning technical direction and delivery.
  • Lead engineer on the mobile app rebuild — modular architecture.
  • Built internal tooling that acted as a delivery multiplier for the team.
  • Improved CI/CD and automated testing to raise release quality and velocity.
Swift 6SwiftUIArchitectureDependency InjectionConcurrency
Past Dec 2021 - Jul 2026

Principal iOS Engineer

Capital One|Nottingham, UK
  • Led architecture modernization across a large iOS codebase.
  • Drove delivery across product, design, and QA in a regulated environment.
  • Raised engineering quality through testing, CI/CD, and team standards.
  • Mentored engineers and shaped technical direction for long-term scalability.
SwiftSwiftUIUIKitArchitectureCI/CD
Past 2019 - 2021

Career Break

Teaching & Personal Development
  • Focused on communication, mentoring, and leadership in education settings.
  • Strengthened coaching and people skills now applied to engineering leadership.
CommunicationLeadershipCoaching
Past 2015 - 2018

Senior iOS Engineer

Capital One|London, UK
  • Built and shipped core banking features used by large customer cohorts.
  • Partnered across disciplines to maintain reliability and release quality.
